    { "step": 3, "action": "query", "database": "matrikkelenbygning", "purpose": "Get buildings in Finnmark municipalities" },
    { "step": 4, "action": "query", "database": "flomsoner", "purpose": "Get 200-year flood zones" },
    { "step": 5, "action": "spatial_join", "database": null, "purpose": "Join buildings with flood zones" },
    { "step": 6, "action": "spatial_join", "database": null, "purpose": "Join flood-zone buildings with municipalities" },
    { "step": 7, "action": "aggregate", "database": null, "purpose": "Count buildings per municipality" },

  ]
}

WHERE fylkesnummer = '54'
